query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (file_name, file_type, platform, ecu_family, doc_category, description, local_path, year_range, notes) VALUES
('E42_12737238.a2l', 'a2l', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', 'definition', 'GM E42 L5P Gen 2 Duramax A2L definition file - ECM_2023_E42 project, 48MB, TriCore architecture', '/home/ubuntu/upload/E42_12737238.a2l', '2022-2025', 'LOCKED ECU - security not yet cracked. Kory personal Denali. Contains full calibration parameter definitions for live tuning.'),
('E42_12737238.bin', 'bin', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', 'calibration', 'GM E42 L5P Gen 2 stock BIN - 11.75MB, TriCore, Cal ID G5537211_P3, OS PN 12737841', '/home/ubuntu/upload/E42_12737238.bin', '2022-2025', 'Segments: 12739125, 12736053, 12736089, 12739082, 12739032. High entropy in cal region suggests compression/encryption.'),
('E42A2L(Original).ols', 'ols', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', 'definition', 'E42 A2L mapped in WinOLS format - 102MB full definition', '/home/ubuntu/upload/E42A2L(Original).ols', '2022-2025', 'Complete WinOLS project with all maps identified and labeled'),
('E42DuramaxKoryDenali(Original).ols', 'ols', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', 'calibration', 'Kory Denali E42 calibration in WinOLS - personal truck stock file', '/home/ubuntu/upload/E42DuramaxKoryDenali(Original).ols', '2022-2025', 'Kory personal truck. Use for comparison when custom calibration is developed.'),
('NEW_PPEI_e42.Channels.xml', 'xml', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', 'pid_channels', 'HPT E42 datalogging channels - 60 PIDs for L5P Gen 2', '/home/ubuntu/upload/NEW_PPEI_e42.Channels.xml', '2022-2025', 'Key PIDs: 12,93,16201,6202,6732,6733,435-438,641-644. Use for datalogger E42 support.'),
('e42_analysis.txt', 'txt', 'gm_duramax_l5p', 'E42_MG1CS019', 'analysis', 'Comprehensive E42 BIN reverse engineering analysis - memory layout, segments, entropy, security notes', '/home/ubuntu/e42_analysis.txt', '2022-2025', 'Foundation for IntelliSpy flash sniffing. Bootloader not in dump. Security in bootloader region.'),
('GlobalB_MY21_142', 'canoe_env', 'gm', 'Global_B', 'network', 'GM Global B MY21 CANoe/CANalyzer test environment - 869 files, DBC databases, CAPL scripts, diagnostic defs', '/home/ubuntu/upload/GlobalB_MY21/', '2021-2025', 'Complete CAN/LIN bus topology for Global B architecture. Critical for datalogger and ECU communication.'),
('Signal_Mapping', 'signal_map', 'gm', 'Global_B', 'network', 'GM Global A and B signal mapping - 46 files, DBC databases, system variables for versions 136-151', '/home/ubuntu/upload/SignalMapping/', '2020-2025', 'Maps every CAN signal to source module, message ID, bit position. Essential for datalogger PID definitions.'),
('FHJG1.A2L', 'a2l', 'ford_6.7_mg1', 'MG1CS019_H4EA0', 'definition', 'Bosch MG1CS019 A2L for 2020+ Ford 6.7L Powerstroke - 8376 diesel parameters', '/home/ubuntu/upload/FHJG1.A2L', '2020-2025', 'MG1 platform successor to EDC17. Project H4EC00_01900. Use for live tuning Ford 6.7L.'),
('Re-mappingcourse.pdf', 'pdf', 'general', 'multi', 'training', 'ECU remapping course - training material for calibration techniques', '/home/ubuntu/upload/Re-mappingcourse.pdf', NULL, 'Training material for Knox - remapping methodology and best practices'),
('AdvancedEnginePerformanceTroubleshootingTechniques.pdf', 'pdf', 'general', 'multi', 'training', 'Advanced engine performance troubleshooting techniques reference', '/home/ubuntu/upload/AdvancedEnginePerformanceTroubleshootingTechniques.pdf', NULL, 'Diagnostic training for Knox - advanced troubleshooting methodology'),
('MG1FunctionalDocument_StrategyBookST180.pdf', 'pdf', 'bosch_mg1', 'MG1CS019', 'strategy', 'Bosch MG1 functional strategy document ST180 - complete ECU strategy reference', '/home/ubuntu/upload/MG1FunctionalDocument_StrategyBookST180.pdf', NULL, 'MG1 strategy book - covers injection, boost, EGR, DPF, torque management strategies'),
('Howtolookupanddownloadfordcalibrations.docx', 'docx', 'ford', 'multi', 'procedure', 'How to lookup and download Ford calibrations from Ford servers', '/home/ubuntu/upload/Howtolookupanddownloadfordcalibrations.docx', NULL, 'Future automation: auto-download stock Ford calibrations'),
('howtoobtainstockfiles.txt', 'txt', 'general', 'multi', 'procedure', 'How to obtain stock ECU files - methods and sources', '/home/ubuntu/upload/howtoobtainstockfiles.txt', NULL, 'Reference for automated stock file retrieval'),
('FCACalibrationReportAugust82025.pdf', 'pdf', 'dodge', 'multi', 'calibration', 'FCA Calibration Report August 8 2025 - latest calibration releases', '/home/ubuntu/upload/FCACalibrationReportAugust82025.pdf', '2025', 'Latest FCA/Stellantis calibration releases for matching tunes to hardware'),
('6.7LCumminsEngineHighPressureFuelInjectionPumpIdentificationDifferences.pdf', 'pdf', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350', 'reference', 'Cummins 6.7L high pressure fuel injection pump identification differences', '/home/ubuntu/upload/6.7LCumminsEngineHighPressureFuelInjectionPumpIdentificationDifferences.pdf', '2013-2025', 'Critical for auto-matching tunes to correct hardware config. Different pump = different calibration.'),
('DodgeRam1500EcoDieselfromA2L.ols', 'ols', 'dodge', 'VM_Motori', 'definition', 'RAM 1500 EcoDiesel 3.0L VM Motori A2L in WinOLS format', '/home/ubuntu/upload/DodgeRam1500EcoDieselfromA2L.ols', '2014-2017', 'EcoDiesel calibration definitions for editor and live tuning'),
('DAMOS_WinOLS(DodgeRamDamos(damoseng)-P1502_K143).ols', 'ols', 'dodge', 'Bosch_P1502', 'definition', '2019+ EcoDiesel DAMOS in WinOLS - full Bosch calibration definition P1502_K143', '/home/ubuntu/upload/DAMOS_WinOLS(DodgeRamDamos(damoseng)-P1502_K143).ols', '2019-2022', 'DAMOS = complete OEM calibration definition. Contains exact thresholds for diagnostics accuracy.'),
('WinOLS(edc17c69(Exampleofmapmoved)-060159).ols', 'ols', 'bosch_edc17', 'EDC17C69', 'training', 'WinOLS EDC17C69 example of map being readdressed/moved to new location', '/home/ubuntu/upload/WinOLS(edc17c69(Exampleofmapmoved)-060159).ols', NULL, 'LEARN: Map readdressing technique. Study before/after to understand how to move maps in binary.'),
('P473_Chassis_Cert_Release_Summary_v001.xls', 'xls', 'ford', 'P473', 'reference', 'Ford P473 chassis certification release summary', '/home/ubuntu/upload/P473_Chassis_Cert_Release_Summary_v001.xls', NULL, 'Ford chassis certification data'),
('TireSize_ShiftPointCalculator.xls', 'xls', 'general', 'multi', 'tool', 'Tire size and shift point calculator spreadsheet', '/home/ubuntu/upload/TireSize&ShiftPointCalculator.xls', NULL, 'TODO: Convert to interactive editor tool for tire size and shift point calculations'),
('GMA6SHIFTCALCULATORv1.1.xlsx', 'xlsx', 'gm', 'Allison_A6', 'tool', 'GM Allison 6-speed shift calculator v1.1', '/home/ubuntu/upload/GMA6SHIFTCALCULATORv1.1.xlsx', NULL, 'TODO: Convert to interactive editor tool for Allison shift point calculations'),
('BCM_Serial_Data_Mapping_Functions_4_01_060327.xls', 'xls', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM', 'reference', 'GM BCM serial data mapping functions v4.01', '/home/ubuntu/upload/BCM_Serial_Data_Mapping_Functions_4_01_060327.xls', NULL, 'BCM CAN signal mapping for future BCM tuning support'),
('BCM_tuning_info.pdf', 'pdf', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM', 'reference', 'GM BCM tuning information reference', '/home/ubuntu/upload/BCM_tuning_info.pdf', NULL, 'BCM tuning methodology for future implementation'),
('BCM_FRS_v4_01_060327.doc', 'doc', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM', 'specification', 'GM BCM Functional Requirements Specification v4.01', '/home/ubuntu/upload/BCM_FRS_v4_01_060327.doc', NULL, 'Complete BCM functional spec for BCM tuning development'),
('GMT191_BCM.doc', 'doc', 'gm_bcm', 'BCM_GMT191', 'specification', 'GMT191 BCM specification document', '/home/ubuntu/upload/GMT191_BCM.doc', NULL, 'GMT191 platform BCM spec for BCM tuning');

logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 1: Unknown column 'file_name' in 'field list'
